heading: Retirement Fund
label: 7298 Retirement Fund

children.label: a
children.text: There is established in the Treasury a fund known as the Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims Retirement Fund.

children.label: b
children.text: Amounts in the fund are available for the payment of judges’ retired pay under and of annuities, refunds, and allowances under .section 7296 of this titlesection 7297 of this title

children.label: c
children.text: Amounts deposited by, or deducted and withheld from the salary and retired pay of, a judge under section 7296 or 7297 of this title shall be deposited in the fund and credited to an individual account of the judge.

children.label: d
children.text: The chief judge of the Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims shall submit to the President an annual estimate of the expenditures and appropriations necessary for the maintenance and operation of the fund, and such supplemental and deficiency estimates as may be required from time to time for the same purposes, according to law.

The chief judge may cause periodic examinations of the retirement fund to be made by an actuary, who may be an actuary employed by another department of the Government temporarily assigned for the purpose.

children.label: A
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, there shall be deposited in the Treasury to the credit of the retirement fund, not later than the close of each fiscal year, such amounts as may be required to reduce to zero the unfunded liability (if any) of the fund. Such deposits shall be taken from sums available for that fiscal year for the payment of the expenses of the Court.

children.label: i
children.text: the present value of all benefits payable from the fund (determined on an annual basis in accordance with ), oversection 9503 of title 31

children.label: I
children.text: the present values of future deductions under sections 7296(i) and 7297(c) of this title and future deposits under sections 7296(j) and 7296(d) of this title, and

children.label: II
children.text: the balance in the fund as of the close of the fiscal year.

children.label: C
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (B), the term “present value” includes a value determined by an actuary with respect to a payment that may be made under subsection (b) from the retirement fund within the contemplation of law.

children.label: D
children.text: Amounts deposited in the retirement fund under this paragraph shall not be credited to the account of any individual.

children.label: f
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall invest from time to time, in interest-bearing securities of the United States, such portions of the retirement fund as in such Secretary’s judgment may not be immediately required for payments from the fund. The income derived from such investments shall constitute a part of the fund.

children.label: g
children.text: For purpose of section 255(g)(1)(B) of the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act of 1985 (), the retirement fund shall be treated in the same manner as the Claims Judges’ Retirement Fund.2 U.S.C. 905(g)(1)(B)
